name: Florida Dems Recount Alert
subject: everything on the line for these recounts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Did you see this yet? The Republicans are trying to steal Nikki Fried's victory, and now Rick Scott is SUING in our Senate race to delay us from counting votes.

**We can 't let Rick Scott and the Republicans get away with this.**

[**Help us boost our Recount Fund so we can WIN these races ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+boost+our+Recount+Fund+so+we+can&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")

**_Begin forwarded message:_** **WOW -- Florida is poised to have HUGE RECOUNTS for statewide offices.**

Our Senate seat, Agriculture Commissioner, and even our governor's race are all headed for recounts.

[**Contribute now to our Recount Fund to help Andrew, Bill, and Nikki ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+now+to+our+Recount+Fund+to+he&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")

It takes a MASSIVE amount of resources to run recount operations -- lawyers, volunteers, and overtime staff. And **we can 't use any of the funds we raised for the general election for these efforts.**

That's why we need your help ASAP. We're depending on grassroots supporters to power our work so every vote is counted.

[**CONTRIBUTE NOW TO OUR RECOUNT FUND so we can ensure Floridians ' voices are heard in the critical elections for governor, Senate, and Agriculture Commissioner ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+CONTRIBUTE+NOW+TO+OUR+RECOUNT+FUND+so+we&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6") __**Democrats are depending on you.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a link below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page.__ **[Donate $5 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")
[Donate $25 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")
[Donate $50 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=50&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")
[Donate $100 now!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=100&express_lane=true&refcode2=exllinks&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")
[Or donate another amount.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")** Thanks for standing with us. This thing isn't over yet.

-- Florida Democrats

---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

[Click here if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba00/1a5213b3/69312872/7195fac1/1837088992/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI2OTMxMjg3MiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiYTAwIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/69312872/77b4ba00?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=9+-+Click+here+if+youd+like+to+unsubscribe+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181109_2_6")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: URGENT: BIG SEAT IN THE SENATE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
🚨FLORIDA RECOUNT🚨 |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad15a05ab1e50d8bff8918443cb326920a887136168384ed5de2859af5114336bc9cff8d9c0947e67e573672d437f9c02f24)**
---

Friend,

Ron DeSantis got nearly _40,000_ more votes than socialist Andrew Gillum in the Florida governor's race...

Rick Scott over _15,000_ more votes than Bill Nelson in the Senate race...
_... But we're likely being FORCED into a mandated recount._
**We 're sending a team of reliable supporters to oversee the entire recount process to ensure it's done fairly,** and we must raise $247,867 by 11:59 PM to fully fund our Florida Grassroots Recount Fund.
---
|
**[Please make a contribution of $5 right now. *Your contribution will be TRIPLED MATCHED, because we know how HARD you just fought in the election.*](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad15bb39aab8235dbf3902ea00c2b6e476104da4fccc5e4307f42ad419828012dd49f7672ff60f4505328bdc2b67bd1ac72c)** [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $80](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad156294d2bed756b804fd087c871fa90c950984222fd11035aae98cec08d8f3e05e9d3a4051bc8b1a26524ec862a47d6ccc) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $60](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad15961450b6179a409e5436268507600ea6f57df491ab8b0339a1f67895dc0685f182f13bfc47e2c5b8b8bf895031c6a4ae) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $40](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad1597be4d1ea37cf42476295c9a482abb273f2b53a6d6b2e1462d47c93185b26671784f26114a5ae4ca7ad59425d9c584e0) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad1559c648e55351bdc13882d93d8836260a3cd428187fc20c989378a99cc60e4c591d293ba9dcfc90539e927529c8ba4a35) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad1519643eec6e928472afc39eb3407fd5e8833d5149ecbe7ba62692ac7874ef47a3c7a01fe7e7c20ef388a8cb2508f7bb55)
**Democrats will fight like you 've never seen before to stop us.**

They want to install socialist Andrew Gillum as governor of Florida and keep out a true warrior like Ron DeSantis who has helped me drain the swamp in Washington.

And Rick Scott is critical to our growing Senate majority. Don't forget that it's the United States Senate that CONFIRMS SUPREME COURT JUSTICES.
**We need to ensure a FAIR PROCESS.**
**[Please make an IMMEDIATE contribution of $5 to fully fund our Florida Grassroots Recount Fund.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad150b6d3b2e7c8cdbc3c8dfb5f9e9cda5fda7c43e38cba38b989fa76103ff412edf39ec992ac435dd3aae450c34595d6b4d)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad15117cd75d47691b8f92797acff9bb1de4599e00ccb83b14955723c9162759d669eaa9e57a2db8357d38a82c9f00fd49df)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad151886ce612b19c8c775811fec75eaddee32eb01358cc5e318938e0bc41c6bbe4c496ca58d99f4b4cc4a970cf1b4bcbcb6)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad15032b421e0266984d0930cf44785f5d4c60fa00da3d1671ff890055236a9237c88b2f3d42ad2e61d8bc453482e141a2ff) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72c406f90ce8ad159e969125353be55597fc88a76767b43d12287670cb4b376ed9514664908bed645467e025caecc3cab1e032049afed68d) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc0072b80f284bd15e2163bea9338b9a91064167100ace86e5fb924899283c7e0cb65b5fe33266eb4da731e46c85a2eeaece1434f348eb0e81) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c0597aad655458e8d871c5a2f9c80a35344416e5f57573d08756a17ef7ad3c8348418aec5646b51a3)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: one more Senate seat could go to Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Just when we thought we'd closed the books on 2018, we have a chance to flip one more Senate seat from red to blue in an unexpected state later this month:
**A Democratic candidate, Mike Espy, qualified for a run-off election in Mississippi.**
This race is as tight as they come -- 41% - 41% -- and with the election on November 27th, we don't have much time to push Mike to victory. He can't win without your support, everyone, and $3 from you would go a long way. I'm asking:
[**Please rush $3 or as much as you possibly can to Mike 's campaign. He can't win without your help.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc133/2a380d31/34cdbe47/f17835/3273436593/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0ZXNweS1ydW5vZmYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTExMF9NV0g0RXNweVJ1bk9mZl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4espy-runoff?refcode=e20181110_MWH4EspyRunOff_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
The unfortunate truth is that Democrats lost a few Senate seats on Tuesday. That means that we've got some tough fights around health care, social security, and more, and we're going to need every last Democratic voice. That's why we have to fight to win this race with everything we've got.
**When we win races, it 's because we fight tooth and nail for every single vote. [I'm asking you to fight once more, everyone, and pitch in $3 or whatever you're able to Mike's campaign right now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc133/2a380d31/34cdbe47/f17836/3273436593/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0ZXNweS1ydW5vZmYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTExMF9NV0g0RXNweVJ1bk9mZl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4espy-runoff?refcode=e20181110_MWH4EspyRunOff_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc133/2a380d31/34cdbe47/f17837/3273436593/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0ZXNweS1ydW5vZmYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTExMF9NV0g0RXNweVJ1bk9mZl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4espy-runoff?refcode=e20181110_MWH4EspyRunOff_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc133/2a380d31/34cdbe47/f17830/3273436593/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
President Donald J. Trump signed a presidential Proclamation yesterday to bar asylum protections for migrants who enter the United States illegally... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=806d40ee7c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Moves to Limit Asylum Protections for Migrants Who Cross the Border Illegally](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2cc99e7ea6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
President Donald J. Trump signed a presidential Proclamation yesterday to bar asylum protections for migrants who enter the United States illegally, Robert Donachie reports. “We want people to come into our country, but they have to come into the country legally,” the President said. America’s asylum system has become overwhelmed with meritless asylum claims in an attempt to game the process.
---
|
---
| [Trump Orders Flags to Half-Staff After California Shooting](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd327f0510&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
As a mark of solemn respect for the victims, “President Donald Trump ordered U.S. government flags to be flown at half-staff after a deadly mass shooting occurred Wednesday evening at a nightclub in California,” Saagar Enjeti reports. “God bless all of the victims and families of the victims. Thank you to Law Enforcement,” the President tweeted Thursday morning.
---
|
---
| [Americans Aren’t Just Happy About the Economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e51d71ef8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The President elected two years ago to revive American prosperity is now presiding over an economic boom. The first two years of the Trump era have been so good that his predecessor has lately been barnstorming the country trying to persuade voters that we’re still living in the Obama era. It is the sincerest form of political flattery,” James Freeman writes.
---
|
---
| [Democrats Won the House, but Trump Won the Election](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3df30caa0c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
Ed Rogers writes that by most measures, Republicans beat the odds of history—and nearly everyone’s expectations—for the 2018 midterms. “The instant analysis is clear: Democrats may have won the House, but Trump won the election.” President Trump and his allies “have an appeal that the elites in New York and Hollywood cannot dismiss or combat,” Rogers explains.
---
|
---
| [The Kavanaugh Debacle Cost the Democrats the Senate](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6359a2b21&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
American Enterprise Institute Fellow Marc Thiessen writes that Americans rejected the Democrats’ smear campaign against Justice Brett Kavanaugh in this week’s midterm elections. “The lesson for Democrats should be clear: Character assassination does not pay. Quite the opposite, it backfired — big-time.”
---
|
---
| [Yes, We Are Better Off After 2 Years Of Trump, Even If Dems Won't Admit It: IBD/TIPP Poll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=745cc156f2&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Investor’s Business Daily_
“The proof is in the poll numbers,” the _Investor’s Business Daily_ editorial board writes about the quality of life in America under President Trump. “The latest IBD/TIPP Poll results show that people are more optimistic about the economy, less financially stressed, less worried about jobs, more satisfied with the direction of the country, and happier with the federal government's economic policies than they were in November 2016.”
---
|
---
| [The World Can Live Without Iranian Oil](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc7fe6242f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“When President Trump ended U.S. participation in the Iran nuclear deal, he promised tough sanctions on the Iranian regime,” Energy Secretary Rick Perry writes. This week, the Trump Administration delivered exactly that. “The new sanctions will deliver an unmistakable message to Tehran: Change your ways or suffer the consequences.”

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=623e6ccd2c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c49c33724&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5ab03a278b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Thank you to Law Enforcement,” the President tweeted Thursday morning. | | -The Wall Street Journal “The President elected two years ago to revive American prosperity is now presiding over an economic boom. The first two years of the Trump era have been so good that his predecessor has lately been barnstorming the country trying to persuade voters that we’re still living in the Obama era. It is the sincerest form of political flattery,” James Freeman writes. | | -The Washington Post Ed Rogers writes that by most measures, Republicans beat the odds of history—and nearly everyone’s expectations—for the 2018 midterms. “The instant analysis is clear: Democrats may have won the House, but Trump won the election.” President Trump and his allies “have an appeal that the elites in New York and Hollywood cannot dismiss or combat,” Rogers explains. | | -The Washington Post American Enterprise Institute Fellow Marc Thiessen writes that Americans rejected the Democrats’ smear campaign against Justice Brett Kavanaugh in this week’s midterm elections. “The lesson for Democrats should be clear: Character assassination does not pay. Quite the opposite, it backfired — big-time.” | | -Investor’s Business Daily “The proof is in the poll numbers,” the Investor’s Business Daily editorial board writes about the quality of life in America under President Trump. “The latest IBD/TIPP Poll results show that people are more optimistic about the economy, less financially stressed, less worried about jobs, more satisfied with the direction of the country, and happier with the federal government's economic policies than they were in November 2016.” | | -The Wall Street Journal “When President Trump ended U.S. participation in the Iran nuclear deal, he promised tough sanctions on the Iranian regime,” Energy Secretary Rick Perry writes. This week, the Trump Administration delivered exactly that. “The new sanctions will deliver an unmistakable message to Tehran: Change your ways or suffer the consequences.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Good news from our team -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Together with the Democratic Party of Georgia, our campaign filed a lawsuit in response to Dougherty County officials discounting absentee ballots. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3274/1252220891/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi - I've got good news! Together with the Democratic Party of Georgia, our campaign filed a lawsuit in response to Dougherty County officials discounting absentee ballots that were delayed due to a number of a factors, including Hurricane Michael. Well, yesterday, a Dougherty County judge ruled in our favor and ordered the county to accept these late ballots! I wanted to take a moment to share this good news with you, but also remind our supporters that we have a lot more work to do. We know for a fact that many other counties were similarly affected by Hurricane Michael, especially in South Georgia, which was hit hard. We will continue fighting to ensure that every Georgian in those counties, and across the state, has their ballot counted. **[Will you chip in $3 to support our team as we prepare to take on even more battles like this?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3275/1252220891/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEwMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11102018-full")** This fight will be long, and expensive, but it is undoubtedly worth it. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3275/1252220891/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEwMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11102018-full")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3272/1252220891/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3273/1252220891/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62f/34a064cc/29338f7/70c3270/1252220891/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Mike's race is heading for a runoff. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **The race for U.S. Senate in Mississippi wasn't decided on Election Day, Peter.** In the Magnolia State, if no candidate gets over 50% of the vote on Election Day, the top two go into a runoff. That's what's happening now. Democrat Mike Espy is heading into a runoff. [**Mike's race is in overtime, and every dollar he can raise will make a huge difference for him. I 'm personally asking: Can you rush Mike a contribution?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0199/88804249/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?refcode=sbe1811espy_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Mike Espy and Sherrod Brown:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0198/88804249/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe1811espy_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0198/88804249/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe1811espy_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0198/88804249/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe1811espy_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0199/88804249/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?refcode=sbe1811espy_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Peter, I know what you might be thinking. Isn't Mississippi a bright red state? Alabama was a bright red state, too -- right up until a Democrat won their U.S. Senate seat last year. These days, we can't rely too heavily on "conventional political wisdom." Polls that came out before the election showed Mike Espy tied in a two-candidate runoff scenario -- exactly where he finds himself now. The bigger question isn't "can he win," it's "will he have the resources to win?" Now that most of the elections are over, the special interests can focus their attention (and their money) on defeating Mike. This runoff will get very expensive, very quickly. [**Let's get Mike the grassroots boost he'll need to win in Mississippi. Chip in $5 or more.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd68/4462dc26/8b809649/201f0199/88804249/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espy?refcode=sbe1811espy_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Recount Rapid Response
subject: Our recount efforts need YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| [**LEGAL RECOUNT VOLUNTEERS NEEDED: SIGN UP TODAY ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba3b/1a5213b3/6ac07f57/7195f487/399441989/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSefGWEOsYAY4C-wyTthsSg9pahV_mhNYNVkWmWWusZl8tEYGA/viewform?usp=sf_link&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+LEGAL+RECOUNT+VOLUNTEERS+NEEDED+SIGN+UP+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&source=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9") The recounts in Florida are a MASSIVE undertaking, and we need YOUR help to make sure every vote is counted.

We need legal volunteers to help Bill Nelson and Nikki Fried run their rapid response recount programs.

[**If you have a legal background, click here to sign up and someone from our team will be in touch!**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba3b/1a5213b3/6ac07f57/7195f486/399441989/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSefGWEOsYAY4C-wyTthsSg9pahV_mhNYNVkWmWWusZl8tEYGA/viewform?usp=sf_link&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+If+you+have+a+legal+background+click+her&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&source=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9")

We can't give up now. We need all hands on deck so we can win these recounts.

Whether you were an avid door-knocker this year or you've only thought about volunteering, if you have a legal background we need you!

[**Sign up to volunteer for the Florida recount efforts now ->**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba3b/1a5213b3/6ac07f57/7195f481/399441989/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSefGWEOsYAY4C-wyTthsSg9pahV_mhNYNVkWmWWusZl8tEYGA/viewform?usp=sf_link&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Sign+up+to+volunteer+for+the+Florida+rec&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&source=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9")

Thanks,

Florida Democrats

---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

[Click here if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba3b/1a5213b3/6ac07f57/7195f480/399441989/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI2YWMwN2Y1NyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiYTNiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/6ac07f57/77b4ba3b?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+if+youd+like+to+unsubscribe+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&source=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_VOL_90DO_181110_3_9")
Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats! Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee _Copyright Florida Democratic Party, All rights reserved._
